title: Miracle on Ice Congressional Gold Medal Act
short_title: Miracle on Ice Congressional Gold Medal Act
stage_label: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs.
crs_summary: Miracle on Ice Congressional Gold Medal Act This bill provides for the award of Congressional Gold Medals to the members of the 1980 U.S. Olympic men's ice hockey team in recognition of the team's achievement at the 1980 Winter Olympic Games.
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs.
